subject: Your Weekly Activity Digest
preview: Here's a summary of activity from the past week.

items.title: 3 New Datasets Published
items.body: RNA-Seq Pancreatic Cancer (v2), Mouse Proteome Atlas, and Human Microbiome Study Wave 4 were published and are now available for download.

items.title: Pipeline Run Completed: RNA-Seq QC
items.body: The weekly RNA-Seq quality control pipeline completed successfully. 98.7% of samples passed all quality thresholds.

items.title: Maintenance Window Reminder
items.body: Scheduled maintenance is planned for Sunday, March 8 from 02:00–04:00 UTC. The system will be unavailable during this window.
